authoritative_grading.extracted_answer: I will implement the solution for the USACO 2024 February Gold 'Bessla Motors' problem. The problem requires finding nodes that can reach at least K distinct charging stations within a distance limit. This can be solved using a multi-source Dijkstra-like approach where we maintain the top K closest charging stations for each node.
